summary: Completed testing of Peer Practice session credits feature. Fixed bug where mentors with plan='mentor' were not being correctly identified. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified to show session credits banner, plan filters, and Book Session buttons.

issues: React-razorpay dev-mode error overlay appears intermittently - does not affect production. Can be dismissed with Escape key.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in get_user_peer_access() - now checks both role=='mentor' AND plan=='mentor' to correctly identify mentors
Fixed bug in list_peers() - now filters out users with plan=='mentor' in addition to role=='mentor'
Session credits endpoint correctly returns: has_access, sessions_per_week, sessions_used, sessions_remaining, is_unlimited, is_mentor
Peer list endpoint correctly returns plan_category and plan_name for each peer
Booking endpoint correctly checks access and session credits before allowing booking
Profile picture validation is correctly implemented in frontend handleSaveProfile() at lines 597-601

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All key elements verified via UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Session credits feature has been tested and verified. Key changes made: 1) Fixed mentor detection to check both role and plan fields, 2) Backend APIs return all required fields for session credits. Frontend correctly displays session credits banner, upgrade banner for users without access, and disables Book Session button when no credits. Profile picture is mandatory (frontend validation).

GET /api/peers/session-credits.details: Returns has_access, sessions_per_week, sessions_used, sessions_remaining, is_unlimited, is_mentor

GET /api/peers/list.details: Returns plan_category and plan_name for each peer, excludes mentors

POST /api/peers/book.details: Checks access and session credits before booking, rejects mentors

session_credits_banner.details: Shows 'Sessions This Week' with remaining/total credits

upgrade_banner.details: Shows 'Upgrade to Book Peer Sessions' when has_access is false

book_session_button.details: Disabled when has_access is false or sessions_remaining is 0

profile_picture_mandatory.details: Frontend validates profile_picture is required before saving

bugs_fixed.issue: Mentor detection only checked role=='mentor', but some mentors have role=None and plan='mentor'
bugs_fixed.fix: Added check for plan=='mentor' in addition to role=='mentor'

bugs_fixed.issue: Peer list only filtered out users with role=='mentor'
bugs_fixed.fix: Added check for plan=='mentor' to also filter out mentors

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real and working

known_issues.react_razorpay_overlay: Dev-mode only error overlay from react-razorpay package. Can be dismissed with Escape key or clicking X. Does not affect production.
